description: Responses used when player input is classified as irrelevant or off-topic. Patient redirects doctor warmly back to clinical situation. Rotate randomly. 0 AP cost.
deflection_responses: Ha, I appreciate that, but honestly I'm really focused on this pain right now, doc.
I'm not sure what you mean — can we maybe focus on what's going on with me?
That's... an interesting question. But this pain is really worrying me.
I think we might be getting a little off track here — is everything okay?
Doc, I trust you, but I'm in a lot of pain. Can we stay focused?
I mean... sure, but can we get back to figuring out what's wrong with me?
Haha, okay... but seriously my stomach is killing me right now.
I don't really know how to answer that. Can we talk about why I came in?
That's a little random, doc. I'm kind of freaking out about this pain.
I appreciate the conversation but I'm really not feeling great right now.
post_youtock_deflection: I hear you doc, but I've done a lot of research on this and I think we should stay focused on what I came in for.
That's interesting but honestly I'm more concerned about what I read online about my symptoms.
Can we get back to my situation? I have a lot of questions based on my research.
